ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., KOHC, PIOC) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock's information */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "52_week_high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock in the past 52 weeks */,
  "52_week_low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock in the past 52 weeks */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the stock */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock, indicating its volatility relative to the market */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades on the given date */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price, which accounts for corporate actions like dividends and stock splits */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume compared to the previous day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "real_time_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock since the market opened */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock since the market opened */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades since the market opened */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* Change in the stock price from the previous day's close */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day's close */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market price of the stock */,
  "volume_change" INTEGER /* Change in volume compared to the previous day */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Current trading status of the stock (e.g., open, closed, halted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_real_time_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the indicator data */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., Moving Average, RSI) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_period" INTEGER /* Period over which the indicator is calculated */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator (e.g., simple, exponential) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feed" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date and time the news article was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the news article */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score indicating the positive, negative, or neutral tone of the news */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the news to the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feed_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, news event) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "triggered_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  "alert_source" TEXT /* Source of the alert (e.g., system, user, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for additional contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting (e.g., language, theme) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "theme_color" TEXT /* Specific color theme (e.g., dark blue, light green) */,
  "font_size" TEXT /* Preferred font size for the interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the watchlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the watchlist is public or private */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the watchlist has been viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist item */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note or comment about the stock in the watchlist */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold price for triggering alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_items_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trade was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "trade_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the trade (e.g., strategy, manual) */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "trade_source" TEXT /* Source of the trade (e.g., API, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtests" (
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the backtest */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest */,
  "initial_capital" REAL /* Initial capital used in the backtest */,
  "final_capital" REAL /* Final capital at the end of the backtest */,
  "total_trades" INTEGER /* Total number of trades executed */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the backtest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the backtest */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the backtest (e.g., period, threshold) */,
  "drawdown" REAL /* Maximum drawdown during the backtest */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the backtest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backtest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtest_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade in a backtest */,
  "backtest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the backtest */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date and time the trade was executed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, skipped) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the trade in the backtest (e.g., signal, manual) */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtest_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtest_trades_backtest_id FOREIGN KEY ("backtest_id") REFERENCES backtests ("backtest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
